paneContent:
вќЇ [System] Your terminal identity has been set. widgetId=agent-hrmw40 displayName=iron-petrel
  canvasId=storyboard-demo configFile=.storyboard/terminals/agent-hrmw40.json serverUrl=http://localhost:1236 вЂ”
  this is a configuration step, no response needed.


в—Џ read scaffold index (shell)
  в”‚ cat src/prototypes/main.folder/SiloDashboard/index.jsx
  в”” 216 lines...


в—Џ Scaffold already wired SiloChart in (imports, three ChartPanels for CPU/Memory/Storage). My SiloChart component
  is in place. Let me verify and signal done.


в—Џ verify (shell)
  в”‚ grep -c "SiloChart" src/prototypes/main.folder/SiloDashboard/index.jsx && ls src/components/SiloChart/ && node
  в”‚ -e "require('chart.js/auto'); require('react-chartjs-2'); console.log('deps ok')"
  в”” 4 lines...


в—Џ save output + signal done (shell)
  в”‚ npx storyboard terminal output --summary "Charts done" --content "Installed chart.js + react-chartjs-2.
  в”‚ Created src/components/SiloChart/SiloChart.jsx вЂ” filled Line chart (react-chartjs-2 + chart.js/auto), dark
  в”‚ theme: borderColor #34d399, backgroundColor rgba(52,211,153,0.18), fill, pointRadius 0, tension 0.3, ticks
  в”‚ #6b7280, grid #1f2937, legend hidden. Props: { data:[{t,v}], unit }. Wrapper h-64 w-full. Scaffold already
  в”‚ imported and wired SiloChart in src/prototypes/main.folder/SiloDashboard/index.jsx with 3 ChartPanels: вЂ¦
  в”” 7 lines...


в—Џ Done. SiloChart component created and three chart panels (CPU/Memory/Storage) are live in the SiloDashboard
  prototype вЂ” visible via the prototype widget on the canvas.

 ~/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.6.0 [вЋ‡ 0.6.0*%]                                                @index.jsx
